Raja sekar reddy oath taking chart
If one sees the chart, the hora lagna is in the dual sign
and lagna is in the fixed sign and it generally indicate a
long life.
Secondly He will be running the malefic Venus dasa from 21
6 2006 till 24 11 2006 onwards.
This from lagna is in the tenth lord and from chandra lagna
3rd and 8th lord from karkamsha lagna the 5th lord in 6th
house.
